classes.comment: A device that elicits or perturbs behavior or physiology.
classes.label: Actuator

classes.comment: An experimental animal housed in an enclosure.
classes.label: Animal

classes.comment: Provisioning covering food, water, social contacts, safety, enrichment.
classes.label: Animal Need Profile

classes.comment: Observed behavioral or physiological process displayed by an animal.
classes.label: Behavior and Physiology

classes.comment: A circadian rhythm associated with a behavior or physiology process.
classes.label: Circadian Rhythm

classes.comment: Deprecated; model actuators via hcm:hasActuatorComponent on Hardware.
classes.label: Collection Of Actuators (deprecated)

classes.comment: Deprecated; model sensors via hcm:hasSensorComponent on Hardware.
classes.label: Collection Of Sensors (deprecated)

classes.comment: A commercial supplier that produces a system.
classes.label: Commercial Supplier

classes.comment: Geometric dimensions (width, length, height) of a physical space.
classes.label: Dimensions

classes.comment: A physical enclosure (artifact) where animals live and behaviors are displayed.
classes.label: Enclosure

classes.comment: An environmental enrichment need or provision for an animal.
classes.label: Environmental Enrichment

classes.comment: A food need or provision for an animal.
classes.label: Food

classes.comment: Physical computing hardware component(s) of a system.
classes.label: Hardware

classes.comment: Deprecated; use hcm:LimitedInteractionWithHumans as a condition.
classes.label: Human Interaction Profile (deprecated)

classes.comment: A laboratory that produces a system.
classes.label: Laboratory

classes.comment: A condition indicating minimal human interference during observation.
classes.label: Limited Interaction With Humans

classes.comment: Deprecated; use hcm:AnimalNeedProfile with object-based needs.
classes.label: Needs Sequence (deprecated)

classes.comment: An observation time window for behavior capture (must be > 24h; may be extendable indefinitely).
classes.label: Observation Window

classes.comment: A spatial region relevant to HCM (e.g., the interior space of an enclosure).
classes.label: Physical Space

classes.comment: A safety-from-threat need or provision for an animal.
classes.label: Safety From Threat

classes.comment: A device that captures signals related to behavior or physiology.
classes.label: Sensor

classes.comment: A social contact need or provision for an animal.
classes.label: Social Contacts

classes.comment: Software component(s) of a system.
classes.label: Software

classes.comment: Commercial supplier or laboratory providing the system.
classes.label: Supplier

classes.comment: A home-cage monitoring system comprising an enclosure, hardware, and software.
classes.label: System

classes.comment: Deprecated; use hcm:ObservationWindow.
classes.label: Time Interval (deprecated)

classes.comment: A water need or provision for an animal.
classes.label: Water

datatype_properties.comment: Duration of the observation window in hours (must be > 24).
datatype_properties.label: duration (hours)

datatype_properties.comment: Height magnitude for Dimensions (units specified in unit).
datatype_properties.label: height

datatype_properties.comment: Whether the observation window is extendable.
datatype_properties.label: is extendable

datatype_properties.comment: Length magnitude for Dimensions (units specified in unit).
datatype_properties.label: length

datatype_properties.comment: Width magnitude for Dimensions (units specified in unit).
datatype_properties.label: width

object_properties.comment: A Sensor captures signals of a behavior or physiology.
object_properties.label: captures

object_properties.comment: Hardware communicates with software component(s).
object_properties.label: communicates with

object_properties.comment: An Animal displays a behavior or physiological process.
object_properties.label: displays

object_properties.comment: An Actuator elicits or perturbs a behavior or physiology.
object_properties.label: elicits

object_properties.comment: Deprecated; use hcm:isCapturedOver.
object_properties.label: extends enough to capture (deprecated)

object_properties.comment: Deprecated; no direct replacement; model with hcm:ObservationWindow if needed.
object_properties.label: extends over (deprecated)

object_properties.comment: Derived (via property chain) from hasHardware o hasActuatorComponent.
object_properties.label: has actuator

object_properties.comment: Links Hardware to an Actuator component.
object_properties.label: has actuator component

object_properties.comment: Deprecated; use hcm:hasActuatorComponent.
object_properties.label: has actuator set (deprecated)

object_properties.comment: Associates a behavior or physiology process with a circadian rhythm.
object_properties.label: has circadian rhythm

object_properties.comment: Links an ObservationWindow to an observation condition.
object_properties.label: has condition

object_properties.comment: Links a PhysicalSpace to its Dimensions record.
object_properties.label: has dimensions

object_properties.comment: Links a System to its Enclosure.
object_properties.label: has enclosure

object_properties.comment: Links an AnimalNeedProfile to EnvironmentalEnrichment.
object_properties.label: has environmental enrichment

object_properties.comment: Links an AnimalNeedProfile to a Food need.
object_properties.label: has food

object_properties.comment: Links a System to its Hardware component.
object_properties.label: has hardware

object_properties.comment: Deprecated; use hcm:hasCondition with hcm:LimitedInteractionWithHumans.
object_properties.label: has limited human interaction (deprecated)

object_properties.comment: Deprecated; use hcm:hasSpaceRegion.
object_properties.label: has physical space (deprecated)

object_properties.comment: Deprecated; use hcm:hasCondition.
object_properties.label: has property (deprecated)

object_properties.comment: Links an AnimalNeedProfile to SafetyFromThreat.
object_properties.label: has safety from threat

object_properties.comment: Derived (via property chain) from hasHardware o hasSensorComponent.
object_properties.label: has sensor

object_properties.comment: Links Hardware to a Sensor component.
object_properties.label: has sensor component

object_properties.comment: Deprecated; use hcm:hasSensorComponent.
object_properties.label: has sensor set (deprecated)

object_properties.comment: Links an AnimalNeedProfile to SocialContacts.
object_properties.label: has social contacts

object_properties.comment: Links a System to its Software component.
object_properties.label: has software

object_properties.comment: Links an enclosure (artifact) to its relevant spatial region (e.g., internal cage volume).
object_properties.label: has space region

object_properties.comment: Links an AnimalNeedProfile to a Water need.
object_properties.label: has water

object_properties.comment: Links a behavior or physiology process to an observation window sufficient to capture it.
object_properties.label: is captured over

object_properties.comment: Behavior or physiology occurs inside an Enclosure.
object_properties.label: is displayed inside

object_properties.comment: Animal lives in (is housed in) an Enclosure.
object_properties.label: lives in

object_properties.comment: Links a System to the supplier or laboratory that produced it.
object_properties.label: produced by

object_properties.comment: Needs provisioning provided by the enclosure context.
object_properties.label: provides need profile

object_properties.comment: Links an Animal to the AnimalNeedProfile it requires.
object_properties.label: requires to thrive
